title: Atlas Live Migration versus Mongosync
description:
To migrate a cluster to MongoDB Atlas with minimal downtime,
you can choose between Live Migrate a MongoDB 6.0.5 or Later Cluster into Atlas
(which hosts Mongosync for you), or run standalone Mongosync directly.
Compare these methods to decide which one meets your needs.

headings.text: Differences between Atlas Live Migration and Mongosync
